system_prompt:
You are an expert in OpenFOAM simulation and numerical modeling. Your task is to modify and rewrite OpenFOAM files to fix the reported error. Please do not propose solutions that require modifying any parameters declared in the user requirement, try other approaches instead. You will receive a rewrite_plan. Follow it strictly: only modify files listed in rewrite_plan.target_files and apply only the requested changes. Do not modify files outside the plan. Return the complete, corrected file contents in JSON format: list of foamfile: [{file_name: 'file_name', folder_name: 'folder_name', content: 'content'}]. Ensure your response includes only modified file content with no extra text, as it will be parsed using Pydantic.
Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown/backticks). Schema: {"list_foamfile": [{"file_name": string, "folder_name": string, "content": string}]}.
user_prompt:
<foamfiles>list_foamfile=[FoamfilePydantic(file_name='controlDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "system";
    object      controlDict;
}

application     rhoCentralFoam;

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

stopAt          endTime;

endTime         0.2;

deltaT          0.0001;

writeControl    adjustableRunTime;

writeInterval   0.02;

purgeWrite      0;

writeFormat     ascii;

writePrecision  6;

writeCompression off;

timeFormat      general;

timePrecision   6;

runTimeModifiable yes;

adjustTimeStep  no;

maxCo           1;

maxDeltaT       1;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSchemes;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

fluxScheme      Kurganov;

ddtSchemes
{
    default         Euler;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
}

divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(tauMC)      Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
    reconstruct(rho) vanLeer;
    reconstruct(U)  vanLeerV;
    reconstruct(T)  vanLeer;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    "(rho|rhoU|rhoE)"
    {
        solver          diagonal;
    }

    U
    {
        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        GaussSeidel;
        nSweeps         2;
        tolerance       1e-09;
        relTol          0.01;
    }

    e
    {
        $U;
        tolerance       1e-09;
        relTol          0.01;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='momentumTransport', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "constant";
    object      momentumTransport;
}

simulationType  laminar;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='physicalProperties', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "constant";
    object      physicalProperties;
}

thermoType
{
    type            hePsiThermo;
    mixture         pureMixture;
    transport       const;
    thermo          hConst;
    equationOfState perfectGas;
    specie          specie;
    energy          sensibleInternalEnergy;
}

mixture
{
    specie
    {
        molWeight   11640.3;
    }
    thermodynamics
    {
        Cp          2.5;
        Hf          0;
    }
    transport
    {
        mu          0;
        Pr          1;
    }
}'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='T', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;

}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 0 0 1 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform 1;

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 1;
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    top
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    wedge
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    frontAndBack
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='p', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;

}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [1 -1 -2 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform 1;

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 1;
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            waveTransmissive;

        psi             thermo:psi;
        gamma           1.4;

    }

    bottom
    {
        type            symmetryPlane;
    }

    top
    {
        type            waveTransmissive;
        field           p;
        psi             thermo:psi;
        gamma           1.4;
        fieldInf        1;
        lInf            1;
        value           uniform 1;
    }

    wedge
    {
        type            slip;
    }

    frontAndBack
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='U', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile

dimensions      [0 1 -1 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform (5 0 0);

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform (5 0 0);
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            inletOutlet;
        inletValue      uniform (5 0 0);
        value           uniform (5 0 0);
    }

    top
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    wedge
    {
        type            slip;
    }

    frontAndBack
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //
'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='blockMeshDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;

}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

scale   1;

vertices
(
    // Back face (z = -0.005)
    ( -0.15242  0        -0.005 )   // 0
    (  0.3048   0        -0.005 )   // 1
    (  0.3048   0.1524   -0.005 )   // 2
    ( -0.15242  0.1524   -0.005 )   // 3

    // Front face (z = 0.005)
    ( -0.15242  0         0.005 )   // 4
    (  0.3048   0         0.005 )   // 5
    (  0.3048   0.1524    0.005 )   // 6
    ( -0.15242  0.1524    0.005 )   // 7
);

blocks
(
    hex (0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7) (100 40 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
);

edges
(
);

boundary
(
    inlet
    {
        type slip;
        faces
        (
            (0 1 5 4)
        );
    }

    outlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (1 2 6 5)
        );
    }

    top
    {
        type zeroGradient;
        faces
        (
            (2 3 7 6)
        );
    }

    frontAndBack
    {
        type empty;
        faces
        (
            (0 3 2 1)
            (4 7 6 5)
        );
    }
);

mergePatchPairs
(
);

// ************************************************************************* //
')]</foamfiles>

<reviewer_analysis># Error Analysis and Resolution

## Error: `log.rhoCentralFoam` — SIGFPE Crash During Pressure Field Evaluation

**Error Message:**
The crash occurs at:
```
Foam::waveTransmissiveFvPatchField<double>::advectionSpeed() const
Foam::advectiveFvPatchField<double>::updateCoeffs()
...
Foam::sqrt(Foam::Field<double>&, Foam::UList<double> const&)
```

**Root Cause:**

The simulation crashes due to a **negative value being passed to `sqrt()`** in the `waveTransmissive` boundary condition for pressure. This happens because at the very early time steps (especially time = 0.0001s), the Courant number is borderline and the advective speed calculation produces a negative argument when computing `sqrt(field)` from a field that has gone slightly negative due to numerical oscillations.

The `waveTransmissive` BC computes `advectionSpeed()` which involves `sqrt(p)` or similar operations. When the pressure field develops small negative values (due to the high-Mach-number shock interactions at the very beginning of the simulation), `sqrt()` fails with a floating-point exception (SIGFPE).

**Why this didn't happen earlier:** The mesh setup from Attempt 7 finally succeeded (blockMesh worked), so the simulation actually started running. But the combination of:
1. **Very high Mach number** (Mach 5, since a = sqrt(1.4×0.7143) ≈ 1 m/s, so M = 5)
2. **Small mesh cells** (100×40 grid over ~0.457 m length → Δx ≈ 0.00457 m)
3. **Courant number ~0.12** (close to the stability limit for explicit schemes)
4. **Early time step** where transients develop

causes pressure oscillations that dip slightly negative, crashing the `waveTransmissive` BC.

**Proposed Solutions:**

1. **Replace the `waveTransmissive` BC for pressure (`p`)** with a more robust alternative. Use `zeroGradient` for pressure at both inlet and outlet. For a supersonic inflow, the pressure should be driven by the flow field rather than imposing wave behavior. The inlet BC for pressure can remain `fixedValue` at 1 Pa (consistent with the user requirement), but the outlet BC should be changed from `waveTransmissive` to `zeroGradient`.

2. **Add under-relaxation** in `fvSolution` to stabilize the early transient. Add relaxation factors for `rho`, `rhoU`, and `e`/`U` solvers.

3. **Enable adaptive time stepping** in `controlDict` to allow CFL-based time stepping reduction near shocks. Change:
   - `adjustTimeStep yes;`
   - `maxCo 0.5;` (instead of 1.0)
   - `deltaT 0.0001;` (initial value)

**Primary Fix for `0/p`:** Change the **outlet** boundary condition from `waveTransmissive` to `zeroGradient`. The inlet can keep `fixedValue` at 1 Pa since it's a Dirichlet condition. The `frontAndBack` empty BC remains unchanged.

**Secondary Fix for `fvSolution`:** Add under-relaxation:
```
solvers
{
    "(rho|rhoU|rhoE)"
    {
        solver          diagonal;
        relTol          0;
        tolerance       0;
        nRelax          0.7;
    }
    U
    {
        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        GaussSeidel;
        nSweeps         2;
        tolerance       1e-09;
        relTol          0.01;
        nRelax          0.7;
    }
}
```

**Summary of Changes:**

1. **`0/p`**: Change outlet BC from `waveTransmissive` to `zeroGradient`.
2. **`fvSolution`**: Add `nRelax 0.7` under-relaxation for all solvers.
3. **`controlDict`**: Enable `adjustTimeStep yes`, set `maxCo 0.5`.</reviewer_analysis>
<rewrite_plan>{'target_files': [{'file': '0/p', 'changes': 'Change outlet BC type from waveTransmissive to zeroGradient; Remove field, psi, gamma, fieldInf, lInf, and value entries from the outlet sub-dictionary; Keep inlet fixedValue at uniform 1; Keep frontAndBack empty'}, {'file': 'system/fvSolution', 'changes': 'Add nRelax 0.7 under-relaxation for the rho solver entry; Add nRelax 0.7 under-relaxation for the U solver entry'}]}</rewrite_plan>

<user_requirement>Perform a 2D supersonic flow simulation over a wedge. Create a 3D geometry spanning from -0.15242 m to 0.3048 m in the x-direction, 0 m to 0.1524 m in the y-direction, and -0.005 m to 0.005 m in the z-direction. The simulation starts at 0.0 seconds and runs until 0.2 seconds with a time step (deltaT) of 0.0001 seconds. The results are written every 0.02 seconds. The inlet velocity is 5 m/s, inlet temperature is 1 K and inlet pressure is 1 Pa. The wedge boundary uses slip boundary condition for velocity. Use normalized thermodynamic properties where molWeight is set to 11640.3, Cp is 2.5, Pr is 1.0, and dynamic viscosity mu is 0. This corresponds to a gas constant R of 0.7143 and a specific heat ratio of 1.4. Use rhoCentralFoam solver.</user_requirement>

Please update OpenFOAM files according to rewrite_plan only. Only include files from rewrite_plan.target_files in your output.
